title: leptogramma pilosiuscula
intro: Leptogramma pilosiuscula, also known as the hairy leaf fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leptogramma pilosiuscula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against infections. Leptogramma pilosiuscula can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
